ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, MSFT) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data point was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data point was recorded */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data point was recorded */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data point was recorded */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the data is from */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the symbol is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update time of the stock symbol details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access (with time zone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
